challenge.title: Korak 1
challenge.description:
U ovoj radionici, kreiraćete medijski katalog. Počnite definisanjem klase pod nazivom Movie.

Dajte svojoj klasi metod __init__ sa sledećim parametrima: self, title, year, director, i duration. Unutar metode __init__, dodelite parametre title, year, director, i duration instancijskim atributima sa istim imenom.

tests.text: Your __init__ method should have the following parameters: self, title, year, director, and duration.
You should assign title to self.title inside your __init__ method.
You should assign year to self.year inside your __init__ method.
You should assign director to self.director inside your __init__ method.
You should assign duration to self.duration inside your __init__ method.

challengeFiles.name: main
